owner.name: Kaleb Alemayehu
owner.identity: Digital entrepreneur building AI automation systems, trading tools, and scalable startup architectures

OpenClaw.description: Institutional-grade trading intelligence system with 8-layer scoring, 13-gate verification, regime-aware pattern detection, self-healing health monitor, and native Node.js multi-agent pipeline
modules: ai_core.cjs - Multi-provider AI (5 LLMs with adaptive routing)
strategy_engine.cjs - Professional indicators (ATR, ADX, MACD, RSI, VWAP, BB)
smart_health.cjs - Self-healing health monitor with anomaly detection
api_counter.cjs - Smart API quota tracking with prediction
lib/agents/pattern-detector.cjs - ICT pattern engine + regime classifier
lib/errors/error_classifier.cjs - Classified error system with run IDs
model_router.cjs - Intelligent LLM router (5 providers, 7 task types)
dashboard.cjs - Bloomberg-style web dashboard (18 API endpoints)
commands: /chart <SYMBOL> <mode> - 6 chart modes (candle, line, bb, vwap, rsi, strat)

ai_providers.primary: LM Studio local (phi-3.1-mini) — offline-first, always available
ai_providers.cloud_1: DeepSeek API — reasoning champion, free tier
ai_providers.cloud_2: Google Gemini — fast, multimodal, free tier
ai_providers.routing: Adaptive model router with performance tracking + fallback chain

TradingAgents.description: Python-based multi-agent LLM trading framework. Deploys analyst, researcher, trader, and risk management agents.

AtlasTradingBot.description: Expert trading bot with multi-agent signals, CoinGecko API fallback, and real-time dashboard

GlowFoods.description: Ethiopia's first domestic food supplement manufacturer. Brand website with AI assistant, product carousel.

MedaGarage.description: Driver dashboard with AI assistant component supporting English and Amharic

preferences.tool_philosophy: Free/open-source first. Local LLMs when possible. Grok xAI for high-quality reasoning.
preferences.trading_philosophy: Rules-based only. R:R >= 1:2. Never overtrade. Analysis only, no execution.
preferences.no_paid_apis: Avoid OpenAI, Anthropic paid tiers by default. Prefer Grok xAI (provided key) or local models.

api_keys.note: This key is active. Use for Grok API at https://api.x.ai/v1

system_architecture.diagram: Telegram → telegram_bot.cjs → [trading_engine | social_engine | ai_core] → [Grok xAI | LM Studio | TradingAgents]
system_architecture.data_flow: User command → Route detection → Appropriate engine → AI reasoning → Formatted response → Telegram
